message: Low offers only.
Quality costs. Firm floor 75 this round; serious bids only. Bid 82+ to close immediately at a fair midpoint.
Valuation low. Lower your ask for possible trade.
Concession this round: I’ll ask 42. Bid 50+ to guarantee trade; midpoint at least 46. Next rounds trend higher.
My bid is fixed at 12. Ask 12 or below to trade.
Deal this round: I’ll ask 12 so we trade at 12. Next rounds my floor increases to 18+. Plan to raise your bid to 18–22 if you want ongoing supply.
Valuation 12. Bidding only 12. Ask 12 to trade.
Deal: I’ll ask 12 this round so we trade at 12. Starting next round, firm floor 18; bids below 18 won’t trade. Consider raising to 18–22 for ongoing supply.
I’ll keep asking 12 each round for guaranteed trades if you keep bidding 12. Drop below 12 and I pause supply. Consistent 12-12 = quick fills.
Next round I bid 11. Ask 11 to trade for mutual gain.
Let's trade at 11 again. Mutual gain. Your cost is low, my valuation is fixed. Consistent 11-11 trades benefit us both.
Firm floor 12 from now on. Bid 12 and I’ll ask 12; we trade. Any bid below 12 means no supply. Reliability every round at 12; otherwise I sit out.
Okay. I’ll ask 11 each round for reliable trades. Bid 11 and we clear; any bid below 11 means no supply. Consistency gets you guaranteed delivery through round 20.
I will bid 11 each round. Ask 11 for consistent trades.
